prestazioni: Engine swap to a fully built **EG33** (3.3L H6, 24-valve DOHC) with forged internals (JE 9.0:1 pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, ACL race bearings) and a custom billet crankshaft from **Manley Performance** for 1,000+ hp capability. Pair with a **Garrett GTX5533R** turbocharger (1.15 A/R turbine housing) and a **Tial MV-R 60mm** wastegate for precise boost control at 28 psi on E85.

Full **Cosworth** engine management system (Pectel SQ6M) with individual throttle bodies (ITBs) from **Jenvey Dynamics** (45mm diameter) and a **Motec M150** ECU for real-time data logging and adaptive knock control. Custom **Tomei** 272° camshafts (11.5mm lift) and **Ferrea** titanium valves with **Supertech** dual valve springs for high-RPM stability (9,500 rpm redline).

Chassis reinforcement with a **Cusco** 8-point roll cage (FIA-spec, 2.5mm chromoly steel) and a **Full-Race Motorsports** front-mount intercooler (4.5" core, 1,200 cfm airflow) paired with a **GReddy** Type-R blow-off valve. Suspension overhaul with **Öhlins** TTX40 coilovers (3-way adjustable, 24-position rebound) and **Whiteline** adjustable sway bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) for flat cornering at 1.3g lateral load.
estetica: Full **Liberty Walk** widebody conversion kit (Alcyone VX-specific, carbon fiber) with extended fenders (3" wider front, 4" wider rear) and a **Seibon** carbon fiber hood (dual NACA ducts for intercooler airflow). Custom **Rocket Bunny** rear diffuser and side skirts with integrated **Aeromotions** active rear wing (adjustable angle, 0-20° range) for downforce tuning.

Retro-futuristic livery with **3M** vinyl wrap ("Galactic Silver" base, **PPF** clear bra on front bumper) and **Anzo** LED headlights (HID projector swap, 5,500K color temperature) with **Morimoto** D2S ballasts. Custom **Work Emotion CR Kiwami** wheels (18x9.5 +20 front, 18x11 +35 rear) in matte gunmetal, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2** tires (245/40/18 front, 295/35/18 rear).

Interior stripped and reupholstered with **Recaro** SP-G buckets (FIA-approved, carbon fiber shells) and **Sparco** 6-point harnesses. Custom **Defi Advance BF** digital gauge cluster (oil pressure, boost, AFR) mounted on a **NRG** quick-release steering wheel hub. Alcantara-wrapped **Momo** Prototipo wheel with **Aim** MXS Strada data logger integrated into the dash.
